cards.title: Mud Therapy
cards._legacyHtml:
📋 Content Coming SoonThis card will contain:
  • Types: Local/Full body/Mud pack
  • Temperature & consistency guidance
  • Indications: Skin, headache, fever
  • Duration: 20–30 min, remove & bathe
